instruments.name: LETRA DEL TESORO NACIONAL CAPITALIZABLE EN PESOS CON VENCIMIENTO 2026-06-12
instruments.issuer: Tesoro Nacional (Republica Argentina, Secretaria de Finanzas)
instruments.capitalization: Zero-coupon capitalizing: interest accrues at the auction TEM, capitalized monthly, day count 30/360 from issue date to maturity; single bullet payment at maturity. finalPaymentPer100VN is fixed at issuance. Recompute formula: 100*(1+TEM)^(days30360/30).

sinelefantesblancos LECAP/BONCAP calculator 'VALOR FINAL C/100 VN' = 102.952
instruments.quoteBasis: ARS per 100 VN nominal face, dirty (BYMA standard; for capitalizing letras/bonos the screen price embeds all capitalized interest, no separate accrued)

flags: Issue date: BYMA ficha tecnica and IAMC both say 2026-04-17; bonistas.com snapshot says 2026-04-15. Resolved: the official result comunicado (Secretaria de Finanzas, 15-Abr-2026) is dated on the auction day, so 2026-04-15 is the auction date and 2026-04-17 the settlement/emision. 2026-04-17 adopted.
TEM 2.00% triple-confirmed: official comunicado 15-Abr-2026 (2,00%, TIREA 26,82%), IAMC 'Tasa licitacion', bonistas. BYMA ficha states monthly capitalization but omits the printed rate.

checkedSources: https://files.allaria.com.ar/attach/Comunicado_resultados_20260415.pdf (official Secretaria de Finanzas comunicado, auction 15-Abr-2026: 'VENCIMIENTO 14 DE AGOSTO DE 2026 (nueva) ... 2,00% 26,82% $4.447.234' M - TEM, TIREA and VNO match exactly)

https://data912.com/live/arg_notes (fetched 2026-06-10: close prices consistent with specs)
corrections: Issue-date discrepancy resolved with primary evidence: the official comunicado is dated 15-Abr-2026 (auction date); BYMA/IAMC emision 17-Abr-2026 is the settlement date. bonistas' 2026-04-15 is the auction date mislabeled as issue. Adopted 2026-04-17 stands.

notes: Universe: all 28 symbols of data912 /live/arg_notes classified, plus the fixed-rate peso BONTE/BONCAP cluster of /live/arg_bonds (T15E7, T30A7, T30J6, T30J7, T31Y7, TO26, TY30P and their currency lines). Every arg_notes symbol is either specced in instruments[] or listed in excluded[] with a classification.

Month-letter code in S/T tickers: E=Ene, F=Feb, M=Mar, A=Abr, Y=May, J=Jun, L=Jul, G=Ago, S=Sep, O=Oct, N=Nov, D=Dic; trailing digit = year (6=2026, 7=2027). Verified against BYMA maturityDate for every symbol.

Final payments for all LECAP/BONCAP are double-sourced: IAMC Informe Diario de Titulos Publicos 09-Jun-2026 column 'Monto al Vencimiento' (2 decimals) and the sinelefantesblancos.com.ar LECAP/BONCAP calculator 'VALOR FINAL C/ 100 VN' (3 decimals); the two agree on every overlapping ticker. S17L6 is absent from the IAMC table; its 107.920 comes from the calculator and is reproduced exactly by the official formula with the auction TEM 2.16%.

Official capitalization convention (confirmed via the 27-Mar-2026 llamado a licitacion and by reproducing the official finals): TEM capitalizes monthly on a 30/360 day-count (US variant: day2 31->30 only when day1>=30) from issue date to maturity; finalPayment = 100*(1+TEM)^(days30360/30). Verification 2026-06-10: this recompute reproduces the official value EXACTLY (3 decimals) on all 14 LECAP/BONCAP - an earlier claim of a 0.006-0.007 residual on S31L6 was wrong.

Issuer note: the bonistas.com API 'description' field labels several LECAP/BONCAP as 'Bono de BCRA' - this is wrong; BYMA fichas tecnicas and IAMC confirm issuer Tesoro Nacional (Gobierno Nacional). Since 2024 the BCRA issues no letters of its own in this segment.

Quote basis: every instrument here is quoted on BYMA in ARS per 100 VN nominal face, dirty. Confirmed by BYMA /lebacs prices matching data912 and IAMC closes, and Cohen's 'Unidad de Negociacion: $100,00'. The tiny prices of D-suffix lines (e.g. SS6D 0.076) are USD per 100 ARS-face VN.

LBJ26/LBL26 (PBA discount letters) are included as peso-fixed instruments because their payoff (par 100 at maturity) is fully fixed, but they carry Provincia de Buenos Aires credit, not sovereign - price them off a provincial curve.
BU3S6/BU4J6 (Chubut) and M31G6 (Tesoro TAMAR) sit in arg_notes but are floaters (or max-of-fixed-and-TAMAR hybrids) - excluded from the peso fixed curve.

asOf prices for reference (data912 2026-06-10 close field c): S12J6 102.849-102.904, S30S6 109.85, T30J6 143.35-143.425, T15E7 140.8-140.95, TO26 99.49-99.65, TY30P 109.5-110.5 - all consistent with the recorded specs discounting at TEArs in the 20-27% area.

TY30P was the May-2025 USD-subscribed international placement (~USD 1bn at issue; outstanding now ARS 1.69tn after reopenings). It carries a one-time holder put: exercise 2027-05-27, transfer 2027-05-28, paid at par with the 4th coupon on 2027-05-30 - now confirmed from the primary document, Resolucion Conjunta 24/2025 (Boletin Oficial 29-May-2025).

Adversarial verification pass 2026-06-10: every instrument re-derived from at least one source not previously listed. All 14 LECAP/BONCAP capitalization TEMs confirmed against Secretaria de Finanzas auction results (argentina.gob.ar pages and official comunicado PDFs: S12J6 2,10/28-Abr-26; S14G6 2,00/15-Abr-26; S15S6 1,99/27-May-26; S17L6 ficha 2,16; S30N6 2,30/11-Dic-25; S30O6 2,55 & T30A7 2,55/29-Oct-25; S30S6 2,53 footnote 13-May-26; S31G6 2,50/05-Nov-25; S31L6 2,75/28-Ene-26; T15E7 2,05 & T30J6 2,15/2025 results; T30J7 2,58/14-Ene-26; T31Y7 2,40/11-Dic-25); printed TIREAs all equal (1+TEM)^12-1. Maturities cross-checked against the BYMA /lebacs T+1 panel; ticker month-letter map re-verified. TO26 confirmed via Rava; TY30P put via Boletin Oficial RC 24/2025; LBJ26/LBL26 via the PBA/Banco Provincia result document. CER-base checks not applicable (no CER instruments in this family - they sit in excluded[]). No maturity, ISIN, coupon or final-payment value required correction; corrections were confined to flags/notes (S31L6 phantom residual, T30A7 stale IAMC outstanding, phantom 'outstandingNote' references) and to upgrading TY30P/LBJ26/LBL26 terms to primary sources.
